heading: What a guesthouse stay looks like

cards.title: Where you sleep
cards.text: Clean, simple rooms — fan or AC, private bathroom, sometimes a small balcony. Not a water villa, but genuinely comfortable.

cards.title: The beach
cards.text: A fenced-off "bikini beach" area where swimwear is allowed — elsewhere on the island, modest dress is expected. We explain this clearly before you book.

cards.title: Food
cards.text: Local Maldivian and international dishes at guesthouse restaurants or nearby cafes — often better and cheaper than resort dining.

cards.title: Excursions
cards.text: Snorkeling, sandbank trips, dolphin cruises, and fishing trips are usually add-ons, priced separately and clearly.
